name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-48
title: tdd-step.py _post_test_green_hooks invokes rabbit-project.py consolidate without project guard
description: tdd-step.py _post_test_green_hooks (lines 225-250) attempts to find project-map.json by going up two parent levels (features_dir, project_dir). For rabbit-level features (.claude/features/<x>/), project_dir would be repo-root. project-map.json isn't expected at repo-root for rabbit-level features so the if-isfile guard fires. But for project-level features (e.g., a user project under repo/<proj>/features/<f>/), this works. The cross-project assumption is fragile — explicitly document supported feature directory layouts in spec, and tighten the heuristic.
